overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Summary of activity & sentiment across all monitored platforms
overview.removeWidgetConfirmDesc: This widget will be hidden from Overview. You can bring it back later from Settings.

needsAttention.title: Needs Attention
needsAttention.desc: Accounts with the highest share of negative sentiment, combined across all platforms.

topicGrowth.title: Rising/Falling Topics
topicGrowth.desc: Change in mention count vs. the previous period.
topicGrowth.empty: No topic metric data to show yet.
topicGrowth.growthUnavailable: Growth data isn't available from the server yet — sorted by mention count only.

dataHealth.title: Data Health
dataHealth.desc: How much data has finished being analyzed per platform — results may be partial until it hits 100%.

shareOfVoice.defaultDesc: Share of mentions per active keyword vs. total mentions, across all topics & platforms.
shareOfVoice.empty: No mentions recorded yet for these keywords.

entityRadar.defaultDesc: People, organizations, locations, or events mentioned most often across all monitored keywords.
entityRadar.globalDesc: People, organizations, locations, or events mentioned most often across all topics.
entityRadar.empty: No entities detected yet — posts for this keyword may not have gone through NER analysis yet.

feedPostKomentar.title: Post & Comment Feed
feedPostKomentar.desc: Posts & comments across platforms for trending keywords

trendDiscovery.title: Trend Discovery
trendDiscovery.subtitle: Trending topics across sources (Twitter, TikTok, Instagram, Google Trends, YouTube)

tiktok.title: TikTok Trends
tiktok.subtitle: Topics gathered from monitored TikTok accounts

instagram.title: Instagram Trends
instagram.subtitle: Topics gathered from monitored Instagram accounts

geoDistribution.title: Mentions Location Map
geoDistribution.descLine: Mentions location spread · {matched} of {checked} locations matched
geoDistribution.infoBanner: This map shows the cities/regions mentioned most often in posts and comments, from {from} to {to}.
geoDistribution.legendLabel: Circle size = number of mentions at that location

trendingSearches.title: Trending Searches (Google Trends)
trendingSearches.descLine: Top Google Trends searches in {geo} · last {period}

youtube.subtitle: Viral videos & keyword sentiment analysis for YouTube

instagram.subtitle: Trending accounts & comment sentiment analysis for Instagram

news.title: News

newsSearchTab.noResults: No news found for this search

newsSummary.analyzedTooltip: Number of articles already processed by the sentiment analysis engine
newsSummary.entitiesTooltip: Number of people, organizations, locations, or events most frequently mentioned in articles

newsSummary.sentimentSubtitle: Tone distribution of the analyzed articles
newsSummary.entitiesSubtitle: Names, organizations, locations, and events mentioned most often
newsSummary.sourcesSubtitle: Media/news sites that are the source of articles

compare.title: Compare Platforms

engagement.title: Engagement Dashboard

accountSentimentTab.title: Sentiment Analysis

threadsSearchTab.placeholder: Search topics on Threads, e.g. jokowi, election, economy...

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.desc: The URL you're looking for isn't available or has been moved.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.subtitle: A complete guide to using MediaWatch

auth.signInDesc: Use your account email and password.

topics.pageSubtitle: Search the database first, then ask permission before reaching third-party sources.
topics.emptyDesc: Add a new topic using the form above.
topics.keywordPlaceholderEmpty: Type a keyword and press Enter...
topics.confirmDialogDesc: The following keywords have no data in our database yet: {keywords}. Continuing will search Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter, YouTube, and news sources (paid/rate-limited) one by one in the background.
topics.searchQueued: External search is running in the background, results will appear automatically
topics.searchFoundImmediate: Data for this topic is already available
topics.searchTimeout: Still processing on the server, check back in a bit
topics.deleteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

topTopics.title: Top 5 Topics
topTopics.desc: Topics with the most posts, ranked from the busiest.
topTopics.empty: No topics with data to rank yet

detail.noResults: No posts for this topic yet

trendGraph.title: Topic Trend Graph
trendGraph.desc: Post volume per platform and comment sentiment over the last {n} days.
trendGraph.empty: No trend data for this topic yet

reports.pageSubtitle: Configure and generate detailed executive analysis across all monitored media channels.
reports.generateTimeout: Report isn't ready yet, check back in a bit.
reports.emptyTopics: No topics yet. Add one on the Topics page first.
reports.insightDescWithTopic: The report will be generated from {period} data on the "{topic}" topic.
reports.insightDescNoTopic: Select a topic to see the report's data coverage.
reports.recentReportsEmpty: No reports generated in this session yet.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account, analysis configuration, and app preferences
settings.unsavedConfirmDesc: You have unsaved changes on this tab. Switch tabs anyway?

account.profileDesc: Basic account info shown on the dashboard

ai.providerDesc: Model used to generate the automated summary
ai.configDesc: API key to enable automated analysis

scraping.defaultPlatformDesc: Platform selected first when opening the dashboard

notification.title: Notification Preferences
notification.desc: Set when you want to receive in-app notifications
notification.thresholdsDesc: So you're not flooded with a notification for every new post — only posts that cross this number per platform get sent to you.
notification.thresholdsEmpty: Thresholds aren't available from the server yet
notification.thresholdInvalidValue: Threshold value must be a positive number

widgetsPage.title: Overview Widgets
widgetsPage.desc: Choose which widgets appear, and their order, on the Overview page

users.emptyDesc: Add a new user using the button above.
users.forbiddenDesc: Your account doesn't have permission to manage users.
users.superuserHint: Superusers have full access to all admin endpoints
users.passwordDialogDesc: The new password takes effect immediately, no old password needed.
users.deactivateConfirmDesc: "{name}" won't be able to log in after being deactivated. Their data & history stay intact, and the account can be reactivated later via Edit.
users.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
